name: YouTube Cat Video Engagement Bot
description: Navigates to YouTube, searches for funny cat videos, selects the first video, and if the user is not subscribed, likes the video and subscribes to the channel.
task: Search for 'funny cat videos' on YouTube, play the first video, check subscription status, and perform like and subscribe actions if not already subscribed.

metadata.notes: Bot performs engagement actions on YouTube videos related to funny cat videos. Requires user to be logged in.
metadata.author: AgentTrust
metadata.sourcePrompt: Go onto youtube and look up funny cat videos choose the first one and if im not subscribed please like and subscribe
